ui_connect_a_gamepad_and_press_any_but: Connect a gamepad and press any button.
ui_nearsectogether_needs_to_install_sy: NearsecTogether needs to install system dependencies (drivers and virtual controllers) to run properly.
ui_a_terminal_window_will_pop_up_to_ru: A terminal window will pop up to run the installation.
ui_play_local_co_op_games_over_the_int: Play local co-op games over the internet
ui_click_video_to_lock_keyboard_mouse: Click video to lock Keyboard/Mouse. Press ESC to release.
ui_play_retro_games_with_others_at: Play retro games with others at
ui_configure_app_behavior_audio_and_ne: Configure app behavior, audio, and network options.
ui_closing_the_window_hides_to_the_sys: Closing the window hides to the system tray instead of quitting.
ui_keep_the_nearsectogether_window_abo: Keep the NearsecTogether window above all other windows.
ui_saves_gpu_cycles_on_apus_stream_sti: Saves GPU cycles on APUs. Stream still sends to viewers normally.
ui_desktop_audio_is_captured_automatic: Desktop Audio is captured automatically if selected in the Linux Screen Share prompt.
ui_mix_a_specific_input_device_into_th: Mix a specific input device into the stream. Use this to capture specific virtual audio cables or your microphone.
ui_how_to_capture_a_specific_app_witho: How to capture a specific app without desktop sounds:
ui_3_find_your_game_app_and_change_its: 3. Find your Game/App and change its Output to
ui_4_in_the_dropdown_directly_above_th: 4. In the dropdown directly above this text, select
ui_5_ensure_the_toggle_switch_above_is: 5. Ensure the toggle switch above is turned ON.
ui_configure_your_arcade_session_to_be: Configure your arcade session to be shared with players on the Nearsec Arcade platform.
ui_once_you_start_sharing_your_session: Once you start sharing, your session URL will be displayed below. Share this link on the Arcade page!
ui_virtual_controller_emulation_option: Virtual controller emulation options. Changes apply to
ui_forces_xbox_one_s_profile_for_all_x: Forces Xbox One S profile for all Xbox controllers instead of the 360-compat fallback. Use this if games are showing wrong button prompts.
ui__existing_controllers_will_be_re_en: ⚠ Existing controllers will be re-enumerated on next connect. Reconnect viewers after toggling.
ui_allows_dualshock_4_and_dualsense_co: Allows DualShock 4 and DualSense controllers to appear natively to games (supports native lightbar/touchpad if the game allows it). If disabled, they will automatically emulate Xbox controllers for maximum compatibility.
ui_passes_gyroscope_and_accelerometer: Passes gyroscope and accelerometer data to the host.
ui_note_viewers_must_use_a_chromium_ba: Note: Viewers must use a Chromium-based browser and manually grant WebHID permissions.
ui_set_the_default_input_mode_for_new: Set the default input mode for new viewers. They can still be switched individually from the roster.
ui__webrtc_video_goes_udp_peer_to_peer: — WebRTC video goes UDP peer-to-peer and never touches the tunnel.
ui_pick_a_provider_all_listed_options: Pick a provider — all listed options are
ui_random_url_no_account_required_powe: Random URL · No account required · Powered by Cloudflare.
ui_uses_ssh_only_nothing_to_install_fa: Uses SSH only · Nothing to install · Fast and simple.
ui_requires_paid_plan_for_http_tcp_sig: Requires paid plan for HTTP/TCP signaling.
ui_tunnel_to_your_own_server_using_rev: Tunnel to your own server using Reverse SSH.
ui_remember_this_choice_don_t_ask_agai: Remember this choice & don't ask again on startup
ui_choose_a_window_or_screen_to_share: Choose a window or screen to share. Your selection will be remembered.
ui__drivers_required_click_this_bar_to: ⚠ DRIVERS REQUIRED — CLICK THIS BAR TO INSTALL (SUDO / ADMIN PROMPT WILL APPEAR)
ui_paste_a_tunnel_url_to_instantly_joi: Paste a tunnel URL to instantly join a private session, or browse public games in the Live Arcade.
ui_connect_a_controller_and_press_any: Connect a controller and press any button. The app will automatically switch to gamepad navigation mode.
ui_your_discord_status_automatically_u: Your Discord status automatically updates when you host or join a session, showing the game you are playing.
ui_configure_global_client_behaviours: Configure global client behaviours and preferences.
ui_keep_the_app_running_in_the_backgro: Keep the app running in the background when closing the window.
ui_keep_the_nearsec_window_above_all_o: Keep the Nearsec window above all other windows.
ui_skip_the_dashboard_home_screen_and: Skip the dashboard home screen and boot straight into the native Host interface.
ui_show_your_friends_what_game_you_re: Show your friends what game you're playing on Nearsec Arcade.
ui_use_your_gpu_to_decode_video_for_lo: Use your GPU to decode video for lower latency and battery usage.
ui_disables_the_standard_60fps_cap_for: Disables the standard 60fps cap for high refresh rate streaming.
ui_disables_vertical_sync_for_the_abso: Disables vertical sync for the absolute lowest latency. May cause screen tearing.
ui_bypasses_system_memory_and_keeps_vi: Bypasses system memory and keeps video frames entirely on the GPU. Extremely fast, but may glitch on some hardware.
ui_nearsec_together_is_not_responsible: Nearsec Together is not responsible or liable for any sessions, content, interactions, or activities hosted by users on the arcade.
ui_sessions_appear_when_a_host_goes_pu: Sessions appear when a host goes public from the Nearsec host page.
